commitMessage: Bug 544255 - [12] SwitchCase AST node has wrong range
irrelevantReason: This commit fixes a bug in the AST node range calculation for Java 12 switch expressions within the JDT's internal ASTConverter. It differentiates between colon-labeled and arrow-labeled switch rules to correctly determine source ranges. This is an internal JDT implementation detail for a new language feature, not a code transformation pattern that can be generalized into a DSL rule for refactoring user code.
summary: This commit refines the AST node range calculation for Java 12 switch expressions in JDT's ASTConverter. It adds specific handling for '->' (arrow) vs. ':' (colon) labels in switch cases to fix source range bugs. This is an internal tooling fix, not a code transformation.
